creator: nrgmilk@gmail.com
text:
Hello

The version corresponding to xorg 7.3 was released.

x11/nvidia-driver
http://jp.download.nvidia.com/freebsd/100.14.19/NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-100.14.19.tar.gz

x11/nvidia-driver-96xx
http://jp.download.nvidia.com/freebsd/96.43.01/NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-96.43.01.tar.gz

x11/nvidia-driver-71xx
http://jp.download.nvidia.com/freebsd/71.86.01/NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-71.86.01.tar.gz

and, I think that x11-drivers is better than x11. 

thanks
